# Pull Request Template

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] style
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] perf
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore
- [ ] ci

## Description

**What** does this PR do?  
(2–4 clear sentences explaining the change)

**Why** is it needed?  
(Problem solved, motivation, context)

**How** was it implemented?  
(Approach, key decisions, new dependencies, breaking changes)

## Related issues

- Closes #XXX
- Related to #YYY

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows project style (black, isort, ruff)
- [ ] Self-reviewed
- [ ] Commented hard parts
- [ ] Updated docs (README, AGENTS.md, etc.)
- [ ] No new warnings
- [ ] Tests added / passing
- [ ] Coverage >80%
- [ ] Files ≤ 200 lines
- [ ] Deterministic pipeline preserved
- [ ] Artifacts & errors.log handled
- [ ] Conventional Commits used

## Screenshots / Demo (optional)

## Additional context
